profile.about_me_intro: Hi! I'm uJayden, I am a Hong Konger and a university student studying LSGI. I've been playing Identity V for several years from 2018 to now. I am not a professional player that in a top tier of ranking, but I enjoy the game and playing my favourite character, Florian Brand.
profile.about_me_gaming: When I'm not playing Identity V, I will do something related to programming, such as coding and maintaining my website, even I am a LSGI student. I also play some games such as Honkai Star Rail, Cities Skylines, Minecraft, Oxygen Not Included and The Sims 4. I look forward to a friendly discussion about IdentityV! About CP: I don't ship nor oppose any CP.
profile.where_am_i_description: I am a Hong Konger, so of course I am in Hong Kong right now.
fun_facts: Previous name is uncle-jayden, but it's too long to type so I shorten it to uJayden.

fire_investigator.name: Florian Brand, the Fire Investigator
fire_investigator.title: Fire Investigator
fire_investigator.description:
This is my favourite character in Identity V. I love playing as Florian not only because he is cute and cool, but also because of his tragic backstory, which makes me sympathize with him. I also like his two-faced complexity and moral ambiguity, with his kindness and hidden darkness.
Anyway, who doesn't love a cute Fire Investigator? 🔥

ui.agree_terms_text: I have read and agree to the
ui.profile_screenshot_caption: Too small? Click the image to view full size.

faq.question: Can I add your friend in the game?
faq.answer: Yes, sure! Please add your reason in the friend request message so that I know who you are.

faq.question: How often do you update this profile?
faq.answer: I usually update this profile every 1-3 months, depending on my time schedule and how much my stats change.

faq.question: Can I add your friend on Discord / Instagram?
faq.answer: Not suggested (until we get to know each other better).

faq.question: How long do you need to reply to my messages?
faq.answer: It depends on my time schedule. Usually I will reply within a few hours, but sometimes it may take longer. Please don't frustrate if I don't reply immediately, I may be busy with my studies or other things. OvO
